title: Bardins Jewellers - where customers are part of the family
description: BUSINESS NEWS - At Bardins Jewellers, making...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - At Bardins Jewellers, making memories with you and making sure you get honest value for your money have been at the heart of everything we do since we first opened our doors in 1903.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - At Bardins Jewellers, making memories with you and making sure you get honest value for your money have been at the heart of everything we do since we first opened our doors in 1903."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Bardins Jewellers has weathered some tough years; we’ve said goodbye to senior partners and faced a challenging economy, but we’ve kept going because we believe in what we do and in the community we serve."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We really appreciate everyone who makes the effort to visit Bardins Jewellers at Langeberg Mall while the roadworks are causing delays.","html":"We really appreciate everyone who makes the effort to visit Bardins Jewellers at Langeberg Mall while the roadworks are causing delays."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your loyalty keeps us going; without it, Bardins Jewellers wouldn’t be here. To us, you’re not just customers, you’re part of the Bardins Jewellers family, and that’s how we treat every interaction.","html":"Your loyalty keeps us going; without it, Bardins Jewellers wouldn’t be here. To us, you’re not just customers, you’re part of the Bardins Jewellers family, and that’s how we treat every interaction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As part of our service to the community, Bardins Jewellers also buys old gold. If you have pieces you no longer wear or need, bring them in and we’ll evaluate them and offer you a fair price.","html":"As part of our service to the community, Bardins Jewellers also buys old gold. If you have pieces you no longer wear or need, bring them in and we’ll evaluate them and offer you a fair price."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you for standing by Bardins Jewellers through thick and thin.","html":"Thank you for standing by Bardins Jewellers through thick and thin."},{"type":"list","items":["Shop 27, Langeberg Mall, Mossel Bay","044 695 2892","www.bardins.co.za"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
